mschart 0.5.0.006
  • Function reference
  • User Documentation

Authors and Citation

Authors

  • David Gohel. Author, maintainer.

  • ArData. Copyright holder.

  • YouGov. Funder.

  • Jan Marvin Garbuszus. Contributor.
    support for openxlsx2 and combo charts

  • Stefan Moog. Contributor.
    support to set chart and plot area color and border, fix for line style none

  • Eli Daniels. Contributor.

  • Marlon Molina. Contributor.
    added table feature

  • Rokas Klydzia. Contributor.
    custom labels

  • David Camposeco. Contributor.
    chart_data_smooth function

  • Dan Joplin. Contributor.
    fix scatter plot data structure

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Gohel D (2026). mschart: Chart Generation for 'Microsoft Word', 'Microsoft Excel' and 'Microsoft PowerPoint' Documents. R package version 0.5.0.006, https://ardata-fr.github.io/officeverse/.

  title = {mschart: Chart Generation for 'Microsoft Word', 'Microsoft Excel' and 'Microsoft PowerPoint' Documents},
